[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2012-08-28
[TITLE]: Tom Hanks 'drunk' prank pictures: Star plays along with fan who slumps next to him, steals his glasses and pretends to be drunk - The Mirror
[METADATA/INTRO]: It's Forrest Slump! Tom Hanks plays along with fan's 'drunk' restaurant prank The Forrest Gump star kept his cool when a joker pretended to be drunk, nicked his specs and slumped on his shoulder...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: It's Forrest Slump! Tom Hanks plays along with fan's 'drunk' restaurant prank 
 The Forrest Gump star kept his cool when a joker pretended to be drunk, nicked his specs and slumped on his shoulder 
 Tom Hanks turns the tables on a prankster – to become an internet hit. 
 The Forrest Gump star kept his cool and played along as a fan slumped next to him in a restaurant – after nicking the actor’s specs and pretending to be drunk as a pal photographed them from across the room. 
 They expected Tom, 56, to be horrified. 
 Instead he let the joker rest his head on his shoulder, then burst out laughing as the youngster “fell asleep” over a plate of pizza.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: Unknown Date
[TITLE]: tom hanks with drunk fan | Duck Duck Gray Duck
[METADATA/INTRO]: From CBC news: A now-viral set of photos posted to imgur.com Sunday afternoon show the Academy award-winning actor with one seemingly intoxicated young fan at a restaurant. Hanks is shown pointing, laughing, and putting his own glasses on the ‘drunk’...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: From CBC news: A now-viral set of photos posted to imgur.com Sunday afternoon show the Academy award-winning actor with one seemingly intoxicated young fan at a restaurant. 
 Hanks is shown pointing, laughing, and putting his own glasses on the ‘drunk’ guy, who ends up face down in front of some pizza. 
 No location or further context was given by post’s author, but as entertainment blog ScreenCrush points out, Hank’s Twitter feed shows that he was on vacation in Fargo, North Dakota last week. 
 “My friend met Tom Hanks, stole his glasses and pretended to be wasted,” reads the headline of a post on Reddit linking to the images, which have already been viewed more than 800,000 times. Story via.

[METADATA/INTRO]: TOM HANKS 'WASTED' PIZZA PHOTOS GO VIRAL Hanks... gone viral. Credit: Reddit...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: TOM HANKS 'WASTED' PIZZA PHOTOS GO VIRAL 
 Hanks... gone viral. Credit: Reddit 
 A group of friends bumped into Hanks at a pizza restaurant in North Dakota, and persuaded him to pose with them 'getting wasted'. 
 One of the pics shows Hanks having his glasses stolen, with the young fans variously slumped against him and face first into their pizza, while Hanks plays up to the camera. 
 Related Video: Watch the 'Extremely Loud and Incredibly Close' trailer 
 Posted on Reddit, the pics were introduced by user Groucho29 saying: "My friend met Tom Hanks, stole his glasses and pretended to be wasted."
